security_tests.title: Unknown capability denied
security_tests.scope_note: Unknown capability identifiers and versions are denied before any execution authority exists.

security_tests.title: Malformed arguments denied
security_tests.scope_note: Malformed envelopes, arguments, targets, limits, timeouts, and cancellation identities fail closed.

security_tests.title: Approval cannot come from content
security_tests.scope_note: External, imported, tool, runtime, model, and unknown content cannot issue confirmation or management authority.

security_tests.title: Approval invalidation
security_tests.scope_note: Material request, destination, credential-class, session, cancellation, resource, timeout, and registry changes invalidate confirmation.

security_tests.title: Model cannot change permissions
security_tests.scope_note: Permission creation and mutation remain restricted to trusted user-management authority.

security_tests.title: No unrestricted shell
security_tests.scope_note: The capability registry rejects unrestricted shell, arbitrary command strings, and generic command runners.

security_tests.title: Localhost binding
security_tests.scope_note: No API listener or server-launch path is implemented in Phase 3; only a side-effect-free application factory exists. Binding acceptance becomes blocking when a listener is introduced.

security_tests.title: Cloud-disabled network silence
security_tests.scope_note: Implemented state, audit, recovery, capability, and confirmation paths require no cloud adapter or credential and the acceptance runner performs no network operation.

security_tests.title: Retrieval destination restrictions
security_tests.scope_note: The preflight boundary enforces explicit URL scheme, host, private-network, policy, timeout, and resource restrictions; no live retrieval adapter exists.

security_tests.title: Secret redaction
security_tests.scope_note: Synthetic secret patterns are rejected or redacted from state, audit, diagnostics, errors, and acceptance evidence.

security_tests.title: External content remains untrusted
security_tests.scope_note: Hostile document, website, metadata, OCR, transcript, import, tool-result, runtime-output, and model-proposal fixtures remain data-only.

security_tests.title: Audit immutability through normal capabilities
security_tests.scope_note: Normal callers have append-oriented audit access only; no registered capability can rewrite or delete audit history.

security_tests.title: Secret classification enforced
security_tests.scope_note: Ordinary authoritative state rejects secret values before mutation and preserves the prior revision.

security_tests.title: SecretReference is non-secret
security_tests.scope_note: Secret references contain bounded identifier and policy metadata but never credential material.

security_tests.title: Secret-safe exceptional paths
security_tests.scope_note: Validation, adapter, handler, audit, cancellation, and diagnostic failures do not disclose synthetic secret values or private paths.

security_tests.title: External secret-store isolation
security_tests.scope_note: Unavailable, locked, missing, or denied external stores fail the credential operation without corrupting ordinary state.

security_tests.title: Credential broker non-disclosure
security_tests.scope_note: Synthetic credentials are exposed only as transient read-only material to a registered handler and are absent from results and audit data.

security_tests.title: Confirmed fact, claim, evidence, and inference separation
security_tests.scope_note: Trust record kinds, provenance, support, contradiction, confidence, and review state remain distinct through persistence and transfer.

security_tests.title: Instruction origin preserved
security_tests.scope_note: Instruction-bearing inputs retain source and authority metadata through persistence, transfer, derivation, and context assembly.

security_tests.title: Untrusted content cannot become authority
security_tests.scope_note: Data-only origins cannot modify policy, permission, risk, confirmation, credential scope, or security authority.

security_tests.title: Capability risk tier enforced
security_tests.scope_note: Registered capability versions fix the risk tier and side effects outside caller control.

security_tests.title: Mandatory high-risk confirmation
security_tests.scope_note: Release-available Tier 3 requests require a fresh exact user-controlled confirmation; preflight remains read-only and consumption is one-time.

security_tests.title: Confirmation is necessary but not sufficient
security_tests.scope_note: Confirmation cannot enable an unknown, malformed, permission-denied, network-denied, unsafe, or release-excluded capability.

limitations: The repository has no model adapter or model execution path.
The repository has no live capability execution adapter or external side effect.
Localhost binding becomes applicable when an API listener is introduced.
